## Quality Checklist

## Constitutional Compliance
- [ ] Article I: CLI First — no UI-only features
- [ ] Article II: Agent Authority — proper agent delegation
- [ ] Article III: Story-Driven — story file updated
- [ ] Article IV: No Invention — specs trace to requirements
- [ ] Article V: Quality First — all gates pass
- [ ] Article VI: Absolute Imports — no deep relative imports
